---
title: "Economics & Trends"
subtitle: "Inflation tracking, macro analysis, and economic data experiments"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [image, title, date, categories, description]
  exclude:
    index.qmd: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

## What You'll Find Here

CPI analysis, inflation tracking, economic indicator deep-dives, and macro trend experiments. Every post includes:

- **The Data**: FRED API, Bureau of Labor Statistics, economic datasets
- **The Code**: Python notebooks with statistical analysis
- **The Insights**: What the numbers actually mean (in plain English)

If you want to understand economic trends beyond the headlines, start here.

---

## All Economics Posts

<!-- Listing automatically generates below -->
